response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and mentoring skills, their experience is fundamentally misaligned with role requirements. They have only 6 months of professional C++ experience (2014-2015) and a career trajectory entirely in web/cloud development. The role requires 8-12 years of C++ expertise with industrial automation, secure coding standards (IEC 62443), and protocol knowledge (Modbus, IEC 61850, MQTT), none of which are evident in the resume.
strengths: Proven software craftsmanship with strong design principles, TDD practices, and architecture thinking
Extensive mentoring and knowledge-sharing experience demonstrated through workshops, courses, and open-source community contributions
Experience building multi-threaded, low-latency systems and microservices architectures handling high concurrency
concerns: Only 6 months of professional C++ experience at National Instruments (2014-2015); role requires 8-12 years of C++ as primary language
Career entirely focused on web/cloud development (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS) with no industrial automation, embedded systems, or IoT background
No demonstrated knowledge of required industrial standards (IEC 62443, SDL), protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, MQTT), or secure development lifecycle practices
